creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Just FYI, this was finally fixed upstream...
https://github.com/curl/curl/commit/338f427a24f78a717888c7c2b6b91fa831bea28e

Mostly it was not an issue in the freebsd port these days due to the infrastructure refusing to build if you asked for GSSAPI_BASE with the ports version of krb5 installed.  But the upstream commit is full closure for this old issue.  So just a note here for posterity.

[Noticed since my old configure patch that I've had around for years is now the same as upstream]
